name: cm
rawContent:
-- cm.cm_bank_master definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE cm.cm_bank_master;

CREATE TABLE cm.cm_bank_master (
	id int8 NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY( INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
	"uuid" varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
	bank_code varchar(10) NOT NULL,
	bank_name varchar(255) NULL,
	bank_shortname varchar(20) NULL,
	autodebit_indicator bpchar(1) NULL,
	participant_indicator bpchar(1) NULL,
	is_primary_dealer bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	is_mas_repo_eligible bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	is_mas_user bpchar(1) NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	sb_org_type bpchar(1) NULL,
	sb_omnibus_acc_no varchar(16) NULL,
	sb_member_code varchar(8) NULL,
	sb_custody_code varchar(3) NULL,
	"version" numeric(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	is_deleted bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	is_migrated bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
	created_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	updated_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT cm_bank_master_bank_code_key UNIQUE (bank_code),
	CONSTRAINT cm_bank_master_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
	CONSTRAINT cm_bank_master_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid)
);


-- cm.cm_batch_job definition

-- Drop table

-- DROP TABLE cm.cm_batch_job;

CREATE TABLE cm.cm_batch_job (
	id int8 NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY( INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE),
	"uuid" varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
	job_id_code varchar(50) NULL,
	job_name varchar(255) NULL,
	job_parameter_json text NULL,
	job_handler varchar(1024) NULL,
	start_datetime timestamp NULL,
	end_datetime timestamp NULL,
	status_code varchar(50) NULL,
	job_type varchar(50) NULL,
	exception_details text NULL,
	outcome text NULL,
	"version" numeric(5) NOT NULL,
	is_deleted bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
	is_migrated bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
	created_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	updated_dt timestamp NOT NULL,
	updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
	CONSTRAINT cm_batch_job_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
	CONSTRAINT cm_batch_job_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid)
);

);
